[PDF_PAGE 4 | score=12] Introduction Warrior Kit Creation SheetThe ADVANCED DUNGEONS & DRAGONS® 2nd Edition Play- er's Handbook and Dungeon Master's Guide told you all you needed to know about playing warriors in the game. But it could be that you want to know more than the bare minimum it takes to play the warrior classes. That's where The Complete Fighter's Handbook comes in. In these pages, we're going to show you lots of interesting things you can do with the war- rior classes . . . things that the Player's Handbook and DMG didn't have room to show you.
